Sarnico Baby Bodysuits( 3-Pack, 0-12 Months) Give your baby the comfort they deserve with our Sarnico 3 Pack Cotton Baby Bodysuits, especially designed for new-borns and growing infants from 0 to 12 months. Made from 100% cotton, these short sleeve baby bodysuits are gentle on delicate skin and ideal for all seasons. The lightweight, hypoallergenic fabric allows for excellent ventilation and absorption, helping your baby stay cool, dry, and comfortable throughout the day. With snap closure at the bottom and an expandable envelope neckline, changing nappies or outfits is quick and stress free - even on the go. These unisex baby grow come in neutral colours, making them perfect for both baby boys and baby girls. These 3-pack of cotton baby bodysuits is made to withstand daily use, making it a thoughtful choice for baby shower gifts, hospital bags, or everyday wear. Sarnico Baby Bodysuits UK Brand Soft Fabric: Made from high-quality cotton that feels gentle and soothing. Snap Closures: Convenient snap buttons at the bottom for easy diaper changes. Stretchy Neckline: Expandable neckline for easy dressing and undressing. Versatile: Perfect for layering or wearing alone, suitable for all seasons.
